headline: VICI Properties and Club Med Announce Acquisition and Redevelopment of Carambola Beach Resort in St. Croix
summary: ST. CROIX, U.S. Virgin Islands & NEW YORK, June 15, 2026--Club Med, the pioneer of the all-inclusive concept with nearly 60 resorts in some of the world’s most desired vacation destinations, and VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI), an S&P 500 experiential real estate investment trust, announced today the acquisition and planned redevelopment of the iconic Carambola Beach Resort, located in the U.S. Virgin Islands, marking the return of Club Med to U.S. shores.
